message:
feat(cli): implement skill formatting with markdown normalization

Add full implementation of the 'ms fmt' command for formatting skill
files with consistent markdown structure and YAML frontmatter.

src/cli/commands/fmt.rs:
- Skill file discovery from configured paths
- Markdown parsing with spec_lens integration
- YAML frontmatter normalization
- Content reformatting with consistent indentation
- Dry-run mode for preview (--check flag)
- In-place file modification
- Itertools for efficient file processing

Formatting operations:
- Normalize YAML frontmatter field ordering
- Consistent markdown heading levels
- Code block language tag validation
- Trailing whitespace removal
- Final newline enforcement
- Line length warnings (configurable)

Integration with spec_lens:
- parse_markdown: Extract frontmatter and content sections
- compile_markdown: Reassemble with normalized formatting

Usage:
- ms fmt: Format all skills in configured paths
- ms fmt skill1 skill2: Format specific skills
- ms fmt --check: Verify formatting without changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
